_contract: Golden fixture for bet-1 schema_match. See SCHEMA_CONTRACT.md in this directory for derivation, variable-field rules, and code citations. An allium-to-json output MATCHES iff: (1) every key in `required_exact` is present with exactly this value, (2) every key in `required_variable` is present and satisfies its rule, (3) NO key in `forbidden` is present, (4) no other keys are present unless listed in `optional`.

required_variable.PK: string matching ^APPENV#(dev|staging|prod)#AGENT#[a-z0-9-]+$ — compose via shared_keys.agent_pk(app_env, slug), never a raw literal
required_variable.appEnv: string, one of dev|staging|prod; must equal the {app_env} segment of PK

optional.owner_sub: Cognito sub of the creating caller — present when created via POST /agents with a JWT; server-controlled, never client-settable
optional.createdBy: caller email when resolvable from the JWT claims
